title: Hieracium niphanthodes
intro:
There is not enough information available about Hieracium niphanthodes. However, I can provide general information about the plant genus Hieracium.

Hieracium is a genus of flowering plants in the dandelion tribe (Cichorieae) within the sunflower family (Asteraceae), commonly known as hawkweeds. These plants are known for their yellow or white flowers, and they have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.

Some of the bioactive constituents found in Hieracium species include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. However, specific information about Hieracium niphanthodes is not available.
